title: Sand Mandala
style_notes: Radial symmetry with a prime number of axes (11, 13, or 17 — randomized each run). Thousands of tiny dots trace sine/cosine paths, layering into a glowing mandala. Pale yellow background, blue-purple particle hues. The code variable names are philosophical: theTimePerceived, yourSymmetries, theSpaceYouExist. A slow eclipse by a same-colored circle gradually hides the mandala. Meditative, mathematical, impermanent.
mood: meditative, sacred geometry, impermanence, slow cosmic breathing
palette: pale yellow (#fffacd), animated blue-purple-magenta particles (cos-driven color cycling)
motion: radial rotation, sine wave oscillation, slow drift, circular eclipse sweep
